title: Senior Financial Analyst - South Indian Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - South Indian Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!
